description: You are a molecular biologist working with a newly sequenced circular recombinant plasmid. Standardize the plasmid sequence from ~/UGENE_Data/plasmid/raw_psynbio.fasta such that position 1 is the first nucleotide of the unique EcoRI restriction site (GAATTC). Export the re-oriented circular sequence to ~/UGENE_Data/plasmid/results/standardized_plasmid.fasta. Identify the longest ORF (minimum length 500 bp) in the standardized construct and create a report at ~/UGENE_Data/plasmid/results/standardization_report.txt. The report must include the original 1-based start coordinate of the EcoRI site, the total plasmid length, the start and end coordinates of the longest ORF in the standardized sequence, the strand of that ORF, and its first 10 amino acids.
